policies.name: misra_c_advisory_violation_recorded
policies.description: Violations of Advisory guidelines are recorded (a formal deviation is not required, but the decision is documented).

policies.name: misra_c_compliance_summary_produced
policies.description: A Guidelines Compliance Summary (GCS) is produced as the primary record of overall project compliance.

policies.name: misra_c_deviation_documented
policies.description: Every deviation records the violation and its supporting rationale, and is approved through the deviation procedure.

policies.name: misra_c_directives_addressed
policies.description: Directives (process/design guidelines, whose compliance depends on project context) are addressed with documented evidence.

policies.name: misra_c_enforcement_plan_defined
policies.description: Each guideline analysed has a defined enforcement means in the Guidelines Enforcement Plan.

policies.name: misra_c_mandatory_not_weakened
policies.description: A Mandatory guideline is never re-categorized to a less strict category; only Advisory guidelines may be re-categorized to Disapplied.

policies.name: misra_c_no_mandatory_deviation
policies.description: No deviation is raised against a Mandatory guideline.

policies.name: misra_c_no_mandatory_violation
policies.description: Mandatory guidelines are never violated — no deviation is permitted against a Mandatory guideline.

policies.name: misra_c_recategorization_in_grp
policies.description: Any change to a guideline's category is documented in the Guidelines Re-categorization Plan (GRP).

policies.name: misra_c_required_violation_deviated
policies.description: Any violation of a Required guideline is covered by an approved deviation.

policies.name: misra_c_static_analysis_before_commit
policies.description: Source is checked against the MISRA C:2012 ruleset by static analysis before it is committed.

policies.name: misra_c_undecidable_manually_reviewed
policies.description: Potential violations of undecidable guidelines (not fully checkable by static analysis) are subject to manual review.
